headlines.description: James Maddison opened his account for Tottenham with the first goal in his side's 2-0 victory at Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs impress again with win at Bournemouth

headlines.description: Arsenal were held to a 2-2 home draw by 10-man Fulham on Saturday, denying Mikel Arteta's side provisional top spot in the table.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal held by 10-man Fulham after late goal

headlines.description: Crystal Palace's Joachim Andersen cancelled out Kevin Schade's first-half opener for Brentford in a 1-1 draw at a rain-soaked Community Stadium on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Andersen helps Palace rescue draw at Brentford

headlines.description: Sasa Kalajdzic scored three minutes from the end to hand Wolves their first win of the Premier League season with a 1-0 victory over Everton.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wolves bag late winner to keep Everton bottom

headlines.description: Bruno Fernandes completed a 3-2 comeback victory for Manchester United against Nottingham Forest in a rip-roaring clash at Old Trafford on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man United claim 3-2 comeback win over Forest

events.name: West Ham United at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: James Ward-Prowse netted his first goal for West Ham United and Jarrod Bowen and Michail Antonio added second-half strikes as they notched a thumping 3-1 Premier League win over Brighton & Hove Albion to climb to the top of the standings on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: West Ham end Brighton's perfect Prem record
